attack_paths.title: Plugin install → malicious code execution
steps: Attacker publishes plugin to registry
User runs lode plugin add <malicious>
Attacker skips permission review or user accepts blindly
Plugin installs git hook or modifies project files
RunPlugin git hook executes malicious commands via Process
existing_controls: Plugin install receipts track source and permissions
control_gaps: No plugin sandboxing or runtime isolation
No plugin signing or integrity verification
suggested_mitigations: Mandatory permission review before first run

attack_paths.title: MCP agent → untrusted tool call → data exposure
steps: Attacker controls AI agent or MCP client
Agent sends crafted lode_init or lode_add with malicious path
Tool handler calls lode-core scaffold module
ValidatedRoot prevents traversal -- attack blocked at core layer
existing_controls: 1 MB max message size limits payload
control_gaps: No rate limiting on tool calls
suggested_mitigations: Add rate limiting for mutation tools

attack_paths.title: Secret scanner → LSP diagnostics → credential leak in editor
steps: Developer opens file containing hardcoded API key
lode-lsp scans content via lode_core::scan_content
LSP sends publishDiagnostics with finding details
Editor stores or transmits diagnostic content
Credential exposed via editor telemetry or crash reports
existing_controls: STDIO transport only (no network in lode-lsp)
control_gaps: No option to redact finding details from LSP diagnostics
No mechanism to prevent editor telemetry capture
suggested_mitigations: Add config flag to redact secret values from LSP diagnostics
Document that LSP diagnostics may expose sensitive content

attack_paths.title: Supply chain → compromised dependency → build chain compromise
steps: Attacker compromises an upstream crate (one of 171)
User runs cargo build or cargo update
Malicious code executes during build (build.rs or proc macro)
Attacker gains code execution in build environment
existing_controls: cargo audit in CI catches known advisories
cargo deny checks licenses and sources
control_gaps: No Software Bill of Materials generation

attack_paths.title: Daemon IPC → unauthorized stop/restart → availability loss
steps: User installs malicious local process
Process connects to daemon IPC socket
Sends {command: Stop} or {command: Restart}
Daemon stops, file watching disabled
control_gaps: No rate limiting on IPC commands

abuse_cases.title: Config merge override weakens security
existing_controls: Merge chain: defaults < global < project by design

abuse_cases.title: Git hook pre-commit secrets bypass
existing_controls: Hooks are optional, lode scan secrets remains available

abuse_cases.title: MCP agent prompt injection leads to dangerous tool call
existing_controls: All tools reuse lode-core security controls
No tool has full system access
